Open to opportunities

Edison
Ayran

Passionate about leveraging machine learning and statistical analysis to solve real-world problems. Experienced in supervised learning (regression, classification, tree-based and instance-based models) and unsupervised learning (clustering and representation learning). Strong background in deep learning, including neural networks, CNNs, RNNs, and transformer-based models. Proficient in SQL and database management, data analysis, statistical modeling, feature engineering, and model evaluation. Actively seeking data science, data engineering, data analyst, or machine learning roles where I can apply my technical skills, continue learning, and contribute to data-driven teams with real-world impact.

Currently pursuing B.S. in Data Science at UC San Diego. I have served as a data engineering intern at Young Progressives Initiative, building and maintaining SQL databases to support volunteer and campaign operations. I am also a data analyst for the professional football club Linköping FC, where I analyzed post-match data to identify tactical trends, strengths, and areas for improvement, creating visual reports, supporting the coaching staff and technical decision-making. Additionally, I've had a role as a research analyst at Triton Ball Sports Analytics, analyzing player and team performance for UCSD sports teams using in-game and training data to optimize lineups and formations. Furthermore, I was a machine learning project lead for the Data Science Student Society, leading several machine learning projects, and most recently, a project manager for Eclipse Analytics leading several sports analytics student-led projects creating meaningful visualizations and insights.

Machine Learning Deep Learning Sports Analytics PyTorch SQL Data Engineering

Sports · Deep Learning
Spatial-Aware CNN for Shot Success Prediction
PyTorch · CNN · StatsBomb · Jan 2025
Custom CNN predicting soccer shot outcomes from 5-channel 32×32 spatial field representations.
86.05% accuracy, 0.7223 ROC-AUC · 31.2% recall improvement over MLP baseline.
PythonPyTorchCNNsStatsBomb

Sports · Deep Learning
NBA Player Performance Prediction with LSTM
PyTorch · LSTM · Time Series · Jan 2025
LSTM with player embeddings forecasting NBA performance across unseen players (2022–2024).
RMSE 1.0085 · 30.7% improvement over Gradient Boosting. Cross-player generalization validated.
PythonPyTorchLSTMNBA API

Sports · Deep Learning
Expected Goals (xG) with Deep Neural Networks
PyTorch · Neural Networks · Jan 2025
